en: Cheer up, Brian. You know what they say. Some things in life are bad. They can really make
you mad. Other things just make you swear and curse. When you're chewing on life's gristle,
don't grumble. Give a whistle. And this'll help things turn out for the best. Hey!
Always look on the bright side of life. Always look on the light side of life.
If life seems jolly rotten, there's something you've forgotten. And that's to laugh and smile
and dance and sing. When you're feeling in the dumps, don't be silly chumps. Just purse your
lips and whistle. That's the thing. Hey!
